dj_text: Plot twist — Bollede Hende I Går was just the appetizer. Jason Derulo - Wiggle feat. Snoop Dogg [Official Music Video] is the main course. Or dessert. Time is fake.

title: Jason Derulo - Wiggle feat. Snoop Dogg [Official Music Video]
